IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (28828844.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dependable and responsible Human Resources Generalist with over fourteen years of experience in a fast-paced environment. Solid team player with great positive attitude and exceptional people skills.
SKILLS: conflict resolution, creative problem solver, excellent communication, customer satisfaction, employee relations, training and development, Excel, PowerPoint, Word, Payroll, People Soft, performance reviews, performance management, personnel files, recruiting
